title: Pterophylla parviflora
taxonomy: Pterophylla parviflora is classified as a species of stick insect or walking stick in the family Phasmatidae. This species is a type of insect, belonging to the phylum Arthropoda. Within the class Insecta, Pterophylla parviflora is further classified as an order Phasmatodea. This classification is based on its physical characteristics, such as its elongated body shape and camouflage abilities. The classification also reflects its behavior and habitat preferences, including its arboreal lifestyle.
